caption: Narendra Modi stands behind a dark wooden podium equipped with two microphones, delivering a speech against a textured green stone wall accented by vertical gold-toned columns with small pink floral decorations. He is dressed in a light-colored traditional Indian outfit, consisting of a long-sleeved shirt and a matching Nehru vest. Across the sequence, he uses dynamic hand gestures to emphasize his points. He begins with his right arm raised high above his head, then extends it outward to the side. He subsequently lowers his arms to his sides, looking forward with a focused expression, before lifting his left hand slightly to gesture toward his chest. His facial expressions shift from animated passion to a more composed state as he speaks, while the background and podium remain stationary throughout the scene.
